'''yathapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobbiness|nobbiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobbiness|nobbiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yathapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæthæpæth|yæthæpæth]] || [[word:yæthæpæj|yæthæpæj]] || [[word:yæthæpæsh|yæthæpæsh]] || [[word:yæthæpæ|yæthæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathathapath|yathathapath]] || [[word:yathathapaj|yathathapaj]] || [[word:yathathapash|yathathapash]] || [[word:yathathapa|yathathapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathapath|yathapath]] || [[word:yathapaj|yathapaj]] || [[word:yathapash|yathapash]] || [[word:yathapa|yathapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathafpath|yathafpath]] || [[word:yathafpaj|yathafpaj]] || [[word:yathafpash|yathafpash]] || [[word:yathafpaf|yathafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathapatha|yathapatha]] || [[word:yathapaja|yathapaja]] || [[word:yathapasha|yathapasha]] || [[word:yathapaka|yathapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathapath|yathapath]] || [[word:yathapaj|yathapaj]] || [[word:yathapash|yathapash]] || [[word:yathapa|yathapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathapathal|yathapathal]] || [[word:yathapajal|yathapajal]] || [[word:yathapashal|yathapashal]] || [[word:yathapakal|yathapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathapathatha|yathapathatha]] || [[word:yathapajaja|yathapajaja]] || [[word:yathapashasha|yathapashasha]] || [[word:yathapaka|yathapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathapathan|yathapathan]] || [[word:yathapajan|yathapajan]] || [[word:yathapashan|yathapashan]] || [[word:yathapakan|yathapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathapathaoro|yathapathaoro]] || [[word:yathapajaoro|yathapajaoro]] || [[word:yathapashaoro|yathapashaoro]] || [[word:yathapakaoro|yathapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
